article_meta.title: US News exclusive ICE agent who opened fire on Renee Good was dragged, hospitalized by illegal migrant driver last year

reasoning: Mixed performance. The model correctly flagged several instances of author-level loaded language and framing, but it violated the attribution rule by flagging a quoted/attributed characterization and missed multiple clear biased word choices in the author's prose.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: It incorrectly flagged an attributed quote (Noem’s 'mob of agitators') as author bias, a clear attribution violation.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: One of five flagged items was a clear false positive due to attribution; the others were defensible.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed several clear author-prose biases such as 'serial illegal immigrant,' 'lengthy rap sheet,' 'sky-rocketing trend,' and 'a whopping 8,000% surge.'
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: For the correctly-identified author-prose items, labels were appropriate (Word Choice, Subjective Adjectives, Sensationalism, Slant).
